summary: Two-stage payment system fully tested and verified. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed showing all new payment fields and labels are correctly displayed. The system correctly tracks: Deposit Pending → Deposit Verified → Balance Pending → Paid in Full.
seed_data_creation: Created test booking with TEST_TwoStage_ prefix via manual booking API during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two-stage payment system is fully functional. Backend endpoints tested: GET /api/admin/bookings (returns final_payment_status, final_payment_proof, overall_payment_status), PATCH /api/admin/bookings/{id} (accepts final_payment_status), POST /api/admin/bookings/{id}/final-payment-proof (file upload), GET /api/admin/documents/{id}/final_payment_proof (retrieval), GET /api/admin/dashboard (returns deposits_pending, deposits_verified, balance_pending, paid_in_full metrics). Frontend verified: Reservations table shows overall_payment_status badge column, BookingDetailDialog shows overall payment badge, deposit proof button, final payment proof upload button, separate deposit/final payment status selects, and public booking form shows 'Comprobante de depósito' / 'Deposit proof' labels.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/admin/bookings: Returns bookings with final_payment_status, final_payment_proof, overall_payment_status fields
backend_endpoints.POST /api/admin/bookings/{id}/final-paym: Uploads file and associates with booking
backend_endpoints.GET /api/admin/documents/{id}/final_paym: Returns uploaded final payment proof file
backend_endpoints.GET /api/admin/dashboard: Returns deposits_pending, deposits_verified, balance_pending, paid_in_full metrics

overall_payment_status_computation.Deposit Verified: When payment_status == Verified AND no final_payment_proof
overall_payment_status_computation.Balance Pending: When payment_status == Verified AND final_payment_proof uploaded AND final_payment_status != Verified
overall_payment_status_computation.Paid in Full: When both payment_status AND final_payment_status == Verified

frontend_elements.reservations_table: Shows overall_payment_status badge column with all 4 states visible
frontend_elements.booking_detail_dialog: Shows overall payment badge, deposit proof button, final payment upload button, separate status selects
frontend_elements.public_booking_form: Labels correctly show 'Comprobante de depósito' (ES) / 'Deposit proof' (EN)
